name: tender-flow-cz
description: Tender Flow CZ plugin for connecting Codex to the remote Tender Flow MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Connect to Tender Flow construction tender data through remote MCP.
interface.longDescription: Use Tender Flow CZ to connect Codex to the remote Tender Flow MCP server. The server uses OAuth authentication, Supabase RLS, audited read-only discovery tools, and a guarded prepare-confirm-execute flow for supported write actions.
defaultPrompt: Search Tender Flow projects and fetch relevant tender details.
List upcoming Tender Flow deadlines for visible projects.
Prepare a Tender Flow task proposal for my approval.
